appmesh.route.headermatchmethod.Exact.Description: The value sent by the client must match the specified value exactly.

appmesh.route.headermatchmethod.Prefix.Description: The value sent by the client must begin with the specified characters.

appmesh.route.headermatchmethod.Range.Description: An object that represents the range of values to match on.

appmesh.route.headermatchmethod.Regex.Description: The value sent by the client must include the specified characters.

appmesh.route.headermatchmethod.Suffix.Description: The value sent by the client must end with the specified characters.
